ValidationRule.description: Request reason field is mandatory to Save the Case
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordType.Id ='01220000000V2lN', ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, 'Door to Door'), ISPICKVAL( Request_reason__c , "") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a value for Request Reason to save the case
